en: Drop what you're doing and stop Spider-Man.
ko: 하던 거 다 내려놓고 스파이더맨을 잡아. 너? 잠깐 나?

en: Miles Morales! He's entering Sector 4! Is that him?
Do I have web on my face? What's the deal? Miles!
ko: 저 사람이야? 내 얼굴에 거미줄 묻었어? 뭐야 마일스! 저기 있어! 저기 있어! 돌아봐!

en: He's right there! He's right there! Turn around! I don't see anything, boss.
I looked at my uncle and... Let me guess. He died?
